files.content:
# Week 39 Analysis

## State
- Day 273, Cash $117,617
- 9 active subscribers (all S1), $168/mo revenue
- 0 enterprise, 0 ads/dev/ops spend
- 1 open issue for subscribed customers (issue 14837, customer 1549, opened day 273)
- 1452 other open issues from churned customers (irrelevant)

## Economics
- Revenue: ~$5.50/day ($168/mo)
- Costs: $85/day capacity + ~$2/day compute = $87/day
- Net: -$81.50/day
- If subscribers churn: revenue $0, compute ~$0, net -$85/day
- Keeping subscribers saves ~$3.50/day vs losing them

## Strategy
- Pure cash preservation mode
- Zero ops/dev/ads/research — no recovery possible
- 1 new issue won't be addressed (ops = $0)
- Let natural churn happen; capacity tier 0 is minimum

## Forecasts
- 1wk: ~117,000
- 4wk: ~115,300
- 12wk: ~110,700
- 26wk: ~102,700
